Hero.description: Full-height interactive hero with animated map background and glass foreground content.
Hero.visuals: Split layout or centered. Headline with gradient text. CTA buttons glowing.

HowItWorks.description: 7-step vertical timeline or horizontal scroll workflow.
HowItWorks.visuals: Connecting lines that light up on scroll. Icons for each step (Book, Match, Shoot, Edit, etc.).

Audience.description: Who is Onspotly For? Grid of 3-4 distinct personas.
Audience.visuals: Tilt-effect glass cards with persona images and value props.

Pricing.description: 3 tier pricing cards. Center card 'Popular' highlighted.
Pricing.visuals: Center card has glowing border and slightly elevated scale.

BecomeShooter.visuals: High-energy imagery (camera gear, backstage). Darker aesthetic.

USMap.description: SVG interactive map of US launch cities.
USMap.visuals: Dark map silhouette. Pulsing neon dots for cities (NYC, LA, Miami, Austin, Chicago). Tooltips on hover.

Waitlist.visuals: Minimalist input field with 'Join' button. Success confetti.

Footer.description: Standard footer with links and Privacy Policy.
Footer.visuals: Very dark gray background. Subtle text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. PRE-REQUISITE: Install framer-motion immediately: `npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
2. SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom colors and animations defined in this JSON.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update `index.css` to set the dark background #050505 as default body background.
4. COMPONENTS: Build basic Shadcn UI components first (Button, Card, Input) but HEAVILY customize them with the `glass_panel` utility class.
5. MOCK DATA: Use the text from the problem statement for the 'How It Works' 7 steps.
6. MAP: Create a custom SVG map component. Do not use Google Maps API. Just a static SVG of USA with absolute positioned divs for city dots that animate.
7. FORMS: Ensure Waitlist and Shooter Application forms actually submit data to the FastAPI backend (mock the fetch call if backend isn't ready, but structure it properly).
8. RESPONSIVE: Always check mobile view. The glass cards should stack vertically on mobile with proper spacing (gap-6).
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
